sql_array: CREATE TABLE employee (EMPLOYEE_ID INTEGER, START_DATE DATE);
UPDATE employee SET START_DATE = '2023-06-01' WHERE EMPLOYEE_ID = 1;
SELECT sprintf_iri_or_null('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d_%s', EMPLOYEE_ID, cast(START_DATE as varchar)) AS job_history_iri FROM employee;
SELECT sprintf_iri_or_null('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d_%s', EMPLOYEE_ID, NULL) AS job_history_iri FROM employee;
